pairs.economic_rationale: Uranium ETF senior/junior: quarterly rebalancing creates mechanical mean-reversion. Sprott URNM (senior miners) vs URNJ (junior miners). Same commodity, same structure.
Gold physical ETFs: both track spot gold via physical bullion. SPDR GLD vs Aberdeen SGOL. Near-identical assets, tracking error reverts.
Uranium producers: Cameco (senior, largest Western miner) vs NexGen (junior, flagship Arrow deposit). Same commodity, senior/junior dynamic.
Gold miner ETFs senior/junior: VanEck GDX (senior) vs GDXJ (junior). Same commodity, leverage spread mean-reverts. Quarterly rebalancing.
Gold royalty/streaming: Franco-Nevada vs Wheaton Precious Metals. Identical business models, ~80-90% operating margins, zero mine-specific risk.
